_comment: End-effector poses the arm sweeps through while IDLE to keep the planning scene populated. Populate 'idle_scan_poses' yourself. Each entry: position in metres (link_base frame), rpy in DEGREES. Same schema as search_poses.json.
_source: Placeholder poses from xarm_ros2/xarm_planner/test/test_xarm_planner_api_pose.cpp (orientation quaternion x=1,y=0,z=0,w=0 == rpy 180,0,0). Replace with real scan poses tuned for the workspace.
